name: burp
description: Codex plugin for Burp-driven web security workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Analyze Burp history, map web surfaces, run checks, and generate findings.
interface.longDescription: Burp helps you summarize proxy history, discover application surface area, run passive and scoped active checks, and generate security findings from Codex.
defaultPrompt: Use Burp to analyze proxy history, map surface area, and generate actionable security findings.
